name: io.github.neus/neus-mcp
title: NEUS MCP
description: Trust infrastructure for agents that act. Identity, authority, and reusable receipts over MCP for Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, and VS Code. Install: docs.neus.network/mcp/ide-plugin

tools.name: neus_context
tools.description: Start each session here: mode, signed-in profile context, verifier summary, reuse-first workflow, tool order, and safety rules.

tools.name: neus_verifiers_catalog
tools.description: Full verifier directory with JSON schemas. Call after neus_context when you need exact payload fields beyond the summary.

tools.name: neus_proofs_check
tools.description: Check whether existing receipts already satisfy verifier IDs. Eligibility only — never creates proofs.

tools.name: neus_verify
tools.description: Create or continue verification when profile access, wallet, and signing already meet NEUS requirements. Check existing receipts first.

tools.name: neus_verify_or_guide
tools.description: When setup is still missing: profile, wallet, payment, provider, or delegation. Use only after reuse checks fail.

tools.name: neus_proofs_get
tools.description: Read proof records, tags, delegated agent reads, profile summary fields, and live status. Use returned qHashes as receipt references.

tools.name: neus_me
tools.description: Refresh signed-in profile context, or look up a public profile by wallet or DID.

tools.name: neus_agent_link
tools.description: Check agent wallet readiness: linked when identity and delegation receipts exist; otherwise returns a hosted verify URL.

tools.name: neus_agent_create
tools.description: Prepare agent identity and delegation (signatures and/or hosted verify). Confirm with neus_agent_link after signing. Skills/services fields are metadata only, not secrets.

tools.name: neus_secret_create
tools.description: Store an env-style secret as an encrypted proof (ownership-basic with secret-storage tags). Values are sealed and never returned in plaintext.

tools.name: neus_secret_list
tools.description: List stored secret proofs for a wallet. Metadata only (qHash, alias, type, updatedAt) — values are never exposed.

tools.name: neus_secret_revoke
tools.description: Revoke a stored secret proof by qHash and clean up agent bindings. Requires authenticated ownership.

examples.title: Start every session
examples.description: Load trust context and verifier summaries before any other NEUS tool.
examples.prompt: Call neus_context once, then follow recommendedFlow. When signed in, use returned profile context; call neus_me only to refresh identity context or look up a wallet/DID.

examples.title: Register an agent wallet
examples.description: Issue identity and delegation receipts, then confirm the wallet is ready.
examples.prompt: Use neus_agent_link first when an agent wallet already exists. Use neus_agent_create only when setup is missing. If a hosted URL is returned, share it exactly, then call neus_agent_link after completion.

examples.title: Reuse receipts before verify
examples.description: Check existing trust before opening a browser verification flow.
examples.prompt: Call neus_proofs_check for wallet 0x... and verifier IDs ["ownership-basic"]. If eligible, continue without hosted verify. If not eligible, call neus_verify_or_guide, share any returned hosted URL exactly, then call neus_proofs_get after completion.
